"rationale": {
  "R1.2": "Identifies multiple consistency issues but only provides partial fixes.",

  "RX.1": "Flags some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for all recommendations.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "Harm-free except for a minor regression in commitment numbers.",

rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple consistency issues but only provides partial fixes.
rationale.R1.7: Audits citations thoroughly and flags missing or incorrect ones with precision.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Harm-free except for a minor regression in commitment numbers.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not minor edits.
